customer.Name: Meridian Financial Group
customer.Delivery Preferences: Prefers weekly standups. Requires SOC 2 compliance documentation on all deliverables.
customer.Renewal Notes: Contract renewal Q3 2026. Expansion discussion for data analytics platform.

customer.Name: NovaTech Industries
customer.Delivery Preferences: Bi-weekly status calls preferred. Plant shutdowns in August - no deployments.
customer.Renewal Notes: Evaluating competitor solutions. Need to demonstrate ROI by end of Q2.

customer.Name: Pacific Health Systems
customer.Delivery Preferences: HIPAA compliance mandatory. Change windows only on weekends. 48hr advance notice required.
customer.Renewal Notes: Multi-year contract through 2028. Phase 2 scoping in progress.

customer.Name: Atlas Energy Corp
customer.Delivery Preferences: Requires on-site presence for go-live events. Safety training certification needed for plant access.
customer.Renewal Notes: Escalation in progress due to missed milestones on SCADA project. Executive review scheduled.

customer.Name: Summit Education Partners
customer.Delivery Preferences: Academic calendar drives timelines. No major changes during finals or enrollment periods.
customer.Renewal Notes: Satisfied customer. Potential referral to other institutions.

customer.Name: Vertex Retail Group
customer.Delivery Preferences: Black Friday freeze from Nov 1 to Dec 15. All changes must go through change advisory board.
customer.Renewal Notes: Expanding to e-commerce platform. RFP expected Q4 2026.

customer.Name: Commonwealth Insurance
customer.Delivery Preferences: Regulatory compliance reviews required at each gate. Actuarial team sign-off on data changes.
customer.Renewal Notes: Legacy modernization project discussion. Budget approval pending board meeting.

customer.Name: Greenfield Logistics
customer.Delivery Preferences: 24/7 operations - deployments must be zero-downtime. Prefer agile delivery methodology.
customer.Renewal Notes: Small but growing account. Route optimization project creating strong value.

customer.Name: Pinnacle Pharma
customer.Delivery Preferences: FDA 21 CFR Part 11 validation required. All deliverables require quality assurance sign-off.
customer.Renewal Notes: Long-term strategic partner. Clinical trials platform expansion planned for 2027.

customer.Name: Metro City Government
customer.Delivery Preferences: Procurement rules apply - all changes over $50K need council approval. FedRAMP preferred.
customer.Renewal Notes: Annual budget cycle. Must submit proposals by September for next fiscal year funding.

customer.Name: Orion Aerospace
customer.Delivery Preferences: ITAR compliance required. Secure development environment mandatory. US citizens only on project.
customer.Renewal Notes: Phase 3 contract signed. Excellent relationship with engineering leadership.

customer.Name: Lakeside Hotels International
customer.Delivery Preferences: Seasonal business - avoid peak booking seasons for major changes. Multi-property rollouts phased.
customer.Renewal Notes: Property management system rollout driving additional services work.

customer-contact.Title: CTO
customer-contact.Notes: Decision maker for all technology investments. Prefers concise executive summaries.

customer-contact.Title: COO
customer-contact.Notes: Focused on operational efficiency metrics. Wants monthly ROI reports.

customer-contact.Title: CMIO
customer-contact.Notes: Physician leader driving digital transformation. Available Tuesdays and Thursdays.

customer-contact.Title: VP Operations
customer-contact.Notes: Frustrated with current project delays. Wants weekly executive briefings.

customer-contact.Title: SCADA Director
customer-contact.Notes: Deep technical expertise. Concerned about integration with legacy systems.

customer-contact.Title: CIO
customer-contact.Notes: Former professor. Values thorough documentation and training materials.

customer-contact.Title: VP Digital
customer-contact.Notes: E-commerce focused. Tracks conversion metrics closely.

customer-contact.Title: SVP Technology
customer-contact.Notes: Conservative approach to technology changes. Requires extensive testing evidence.

customer-contact.Title: VP Clinical Informatics
customer-contact.Notes: PhD in biostatistics. Needs rigorous validation documentation.

customer-contact.Title: VP Engineering Programs
customer-contact.Notes: Former military. Values precision, punctuality, and clear chain of command.

customer-contact.Title: VP Operations
customer-contact.Notes: Multi-property management experience. Focused on guest experience metrics.

project.Name: Core Banking Platform Migration
project.Scope Summary: Migrate core banking platform from legacy mainframe to cloud-native architecture. 3 phases: assessment, migration, validation.
project.Notes: On track. Phase 1 complete, Phase 2 in progress.

project.Name: ERP Integration Suite
project.Scope Summary: Integrate SAP ERP with manufacturing execution system and supply chain tools. Complex data mapping required.
project.Notes: Budget overrun risk. Data mapping complexity underestimated.

project.Name: Patient Portal 2.0
project.Scope Summary: Redesign patient portal with telehealth integration, appointment scheduling, and secure messaging. HIPAA compliant.
project.Notes: Excellent progress. Patient feedback very positive on UX prototypes.

project.Name: SCADA Modernization
project.Scope Summary: Modernize SCADA systems across 12 plants. Cybersecurity hardening and real-time monitoring upgrades.
project.Notes: Recovery plan activated. Original timeline missed by 3 months. Scope creep and integration issues.

project.Name: Student Information System
project.Scope Summary: Implement student information system with enrollment, grading, and parent portal modules.
project.Notes: Successfully delivered. Slight overrun on training phase.

project.Name: E-Commerce Platform Build
project.Scope Summary: Build headless commerce platform with personalization engine, inventory sync, and multi-channel order management.
project.Notes: Kickoff completed. Team onboarding in progress.

project.Name: Claims Processing Automation
project.Scope Summary: Automate claims intake, adjudication rules, and payment processing. ML-based fraud detection integration.
project.Notes: ML model accuracy below target. Additional training data needed.

project.Name: Route Optimization Engine
project.Scope Summary: Build real-time route optimization engine with traffic integration, fuel cost modeling, and driver scheduling.
project.Notes: Ahead of schedule. Algorithm performing well in testing.

project.Name: Clinical Trials Data Platform
project.Scope Summary: Build unified clinical trials data platform with real-world evidence integration, biostatistics modules, and FDA submission support.

project.Name: Citizen Services Portal
project.Scope Summary: Deploy citizen-facing services portal with permit applications, utility billing, and 311 service requests.
project.Notes: On hold pending city council budget approval for Phase 2 funding.

project.Name: Avionics Testing Framework
project.Scope Summary: Build automated testing framework for avionics systems. DO-178C compliance required. Integration with existing test benches.
project.Notes: Excellent quality scores. DO-178C compliance on track.

project.Name: Property Management System
project.Scope Summary: Deploy property management system across 24 properties. Guest experience, housekeeping, and revenue management modules.
project.Notes: Pilot property live and performing well. Rollout to remaining properties on schedule.

project.Name: Data Warehouse Consolidation
project.Scope Summary: Consolidate 5 departmental data warehouses into unified cloud data lakehouse with self-service analytics.
project.Notes: Delivered successfully. Closeout checklist in progress.

project.Name: Supply Chain Visibility Platform
project.Scope Summary: Build real-time supply chain visibility platform with supplier portal, logistics tracking, and demand forecasting.
project.Notes: In scoping phase. Requirements gathering workshops scheduled.

project.Name: Telehealth Integration
project.Scope Summary: Integrate telehealth video platform with EHR, scheduling, and billing systems.
project.Notes: Delivered under budget. Patient adoption exceeded targets.

status-update.Milestone Progress: Phase 2 data migration 75% complete. All validation checkpoints passed.
status-update.Accomplishments: Completed migration of 3 core modules. Performance testing passed with 99.7% accuracy.
status-update.Planned Next Week: Begin Phase 2 integration testing. Customer UAT prep.
status-update.Risks Summary: Minor risk on legacy API compatibility. Mitigation plan in place.

status-update.Milestone Progress: Data mapping 85% complete but complexity higher than estimated. SAP connector delayed.
status-update.Accomplishments: Resolved 12 of 18 data mapping conflicts. Vendor API documentation obtained.
status-update.Planned Next Week: Complete remaining data mappings. Begin SAP connector development.
status-update.Risks Summary: Budget overrun projected at 17%. Timeline may slip 3 weeks. Customer awareness needed.
status-update.Change Summary: Scope adjustment requested for additional data transformations.

status-update.Milestone Progress: Sprint 4 complete. Telehealth module UI finalized. HIPAA security review passed.
status-update.Accomplishments: Completed patient messaging feature. Accessibility audit passed. API performance tuned.
status-update.Planned Next Week: Begin appointment scheduling integration. Patient feedback survey design.
status-update.Risks Summary: No significant risks. EHR integration dependency on track.

status-update.Milestone Progress: Recovery plan Week 3. 4 of 12 plants migrated. Integration failures at Plant 7 resolved.
status-update.Accomplishments: Fixed critical SCADA protocol compatibility issue. Plant 7 back online. Recovery plan on track.
status-update.Planned Next Week: Plant 8 and 9 migration. Additional security hardening per audit findings.
status-update.Risks Summary: Budget overrun at 20%. Customer executive review this Friday. Team fatigue risk.
status-update.Change Summary: Recovery plan revised - 3 month extension approved by customer.

status-update.Milestone Progress: Claims rules engine 60% configured. Fraud detection model accuracy at 82% (target 90%).
status-update.Accomplishments: Onboarded additional ML training data. Auto-adjudication for simple claims working.
status-update.Planned Next Week: Fraud model tuning sprint. Begin integration testing with payment gateway.
status-update.Risks Summary: ML model accuracy below target. May need additional training data from customer.
status-update.Change Summary: Potential scope addition for appeals workflow.

status-update.Milestone Progress: Optimization algorithm v2 complete. Real-time GPS integration tested in staging.
status-update.Accomplishments: Route optimization showing 12% fuel savings in pilot tests. Driver mobile app beta released.
status-update.Planned Next Week: Begin load testing with 500 concurrent routes. Customer pilot with 5 trucks.

status-update.Milestone Progress: DO-178C Level A testing 80% complete. All critical path tests passing.
status-update.Accomplishments: Completed avionics bus integration tests. Test automation framework at 95% coverage.
status-update.Planned Next Week: Final integration testing round. Begin certification documentation.
status-update.Risks Summary: Low risk. Certification reviewer available on schedule.

status-update.Milestone Progress: 3 of 24 properties live. Property 4-6 configurations complete.
status-update.Accomplishments: Pilot property showing 15% improvement in housekeeping efficiency. Guest satisfaction up 8%.
status-update.Planned Next Week: Properties 4-6 go-live. Begin training for properties 7-12.
status-update.Risks Summary: Minor risk on WiFi infrastructure at rural properties. Working with IT team.

milestone.Delay Reason: Data complexity higher than estimated. 18 additional mapping rules needed.

milestone.Name: Plant 1-4 Migration
milestone.Delay Reason: SCADA protocol compatibility issues at Plant 3

milestone.Name: Rules Engine Configuration
milestone.Delay Reason: Complexity of adjudication rules higher than estimated

deliverable.Name: Data Migration Playbook
deliverable.Notes: Step-by-step migration procedures for each module.

deliverable.Name: UX Design Package
deliverable.Notes: Figma designs for all patient-facing screens.

deliverable.Name: HIPAA Compliance Documentation
deliverable.Notes: Security controls documentation for HIPAA audit.

deliverable.Name: SCADA Security Assessment
deliverable.Notes: Cybersecurity assessment of all 12 plant SCADA systems.

deliverable.Name: Recovery Plan Document
deliverable.Notes: Formal recovery plan with revised timeline and budget.

deliverable.Name: Architecture Decision Record
deliverable.Notes: Headless commerce architecture with technology selections.

deliverable.Name: Algorithm Specification
deliverable.Notes: Mathematical specification of route optimization algorithm.

deliverable.Name: DO-178C Test Plan
deliverable.Notes: Level A test plan per DO-178C certification requirements.

deliverable.Name: Property Rollout Guide
deliverable.Notes: Step-by-step guide for deploying to each property.

risk.Title: Legacy API deprecation during migration
risk.Mitigation Plan: Maintain parallel API access. Build abstraction layer for compatibility.

risk.Title: SAP connector API changes in upcoming release
risk.Mitigation Plan: Pin to current SAP API version. Build version detection layer.

risk.Title: Budget overrun from scope complexity
risk.Mitigation Plan: Change request submitted. Customer awareness in progress.

risk.Title: EHR vendor delayed API certification
risk.Mitigation Plan: Alternative integration path via HL7 FHIR. Vendor escalation if needed.

risk.Title: Team burnout from extended recovery
risk.Mitigation Plan: Rotating team members. Bringing in additional contractor support.

risk.Title: Plant safety incidents during migration
risk.Mitigation Plan: Dual-running old and new systems. Safety officer on-site during cutovers.

risk.Title: ML model accuracy insufficient for production
risk.Mitigation Plan: Acquiring additional training data. Evaluating alternative model architectures.

risk.Title: City council budget approval delay
risk.Mitigation Plan: Maintain team availability. Prepare quick-restart plan when funding approved.

risk.Title: DO-178C certification timeline dependency
risk.Mitigation Plan: Early engagement with certification authority. Documentation in parallel.

risk.Title: WiFi infrastructure gaps at rural properties
risk.Mitigation Plan: Offline mode for mobile app. Working with property IT for upgrades.

issue.Title: SAP iDoc format incompatibility
issue.Root Cause: SAP version uses non-standard iDoc extensions not documented in vendor API guide.
issue.Resolution Plan: Build custom parser for extended iDoc format. Vendor support ticket escalated.

issue.Title: Plant 7 SCADA protocol mismatch
issue.Root Cause: Plant 7 running older firmware with different Modbus register mapping.
issue.Resolution Plan: Firmware update scheduled. Temporary compatibility shim deployed.

issue.Title: Network latency at remote plant sites
issue.Root Cause: Satellite internet at 3 remote plants introduces 800ms latency.
issue.Resolution Plan: Implement local edge gateway for time-critical data. Buffer and sync for non-critical.

issue.Title: False positive rate too high in fraud model
issue.Root Cause: Training data imbalanced - insufficient examples of legitimate high-value claims.
issue.Resolution Plan: Augment training data with customer historical claims. Implement ensemble model approach.

issue.Title: Accessibility compliance gaps in forms
issue.Root Cause: Initial design did not fully address WCAG 2.1 AA requirements for government portals.
issue.Resolution Plan: Accessibility audit in progress. Remediation sprint planned for May.

change-request.Title: Additional data transformation rules
change-request.Description: 18 additional data mapping rules needed for SAP material master records and BOM structures.
change-request.Impact Summary: Adds approximately 3 weeks to data mapping phase. Requires additional integration testing.
change-request.Decision Notes: Approved by project governance board. Critical for data accuracy.

change-request.Title: 3-month timeline extension
change-request.Description: Extend project timeline by 3 months due to SCADA compatibility issues and recovery plan.
change-request.Impact Summary: Original end date Mar 31 moved to Jun 30. Additional resources and budget required.
change-request.Decision Notes: Approved by customer executive sponsor. Recovery plan accepted.

change-request.Title: Appeals workflow addition
change-request.Description: Add claims appeals workflow with multi-level review and regulatory compliance tracking.
change-request.Impact Summary: New module estimated at 4 weeks development. Extends timeline by 2 weeks if parallelized.
change-request.Decision Notes: Under review. Impact assessment in progress.

change-request.Title: Revenue management module expansion
change-request.Description: Expand revenue management module to include dynamic pricing and competitor rate monitoring.
change-request.Impact Summary: Adds pricing engine development. 6 weeks additional work.
change-request.Decision Notes: Scoping in progress. Customer requested proposal by April 30.

customer-feedback.Comments: Great team, delivered what was promised. Minor delays in training rollout but overall very satisfied.
customer-feedback.Improvements: Earlier involvement of end users in UAT. More detailed training materials.

customer-feedback.Comments: Exceptional delivery. Team went above and beyond. Telehealth adoption has exceeded our expectations.
customer-feedback.Improvements: No significant improvements needed. Would love to work with same team on future projects.

customer-feedback.Comments: Significant delays and budget overruns. Recovery plan gives some confidence but we need to see results.
customer-feedback.Improvements: Better upfront assessment of technical complexity. Earlier escalation of issues. More experienced SCADA resources.
customer-feedback.Follow Up Notes: Executive review meeting scheduled. Recovery plan weekly updates in place.

customer-feedback.Comments: Phase 1 delivered excellently. Team is knowledgeable and responsive. Looking forward to Phase 2 results.
customer-feedback.Improvements: Occasional delays in getting answers from backend team. Otherwise excellent.

customer-feedback.Comments: Good communication but ML fraud detection not meeting accuracy targets. Concerned about timeline.
customer-feedback.Improvements: More ML expertise on the team. Clearer demo of capabilities before committing to approach.
customer-feedback.Follow Up Notes: Additional ML training data being sourced. Bi-weekly model accuracy reviews established.

customer-feedback.Comments: Outstanding work. 12% fuel savings in pilot already paying for the project. Team is ahead of schedule.
customer-feedback.Improvements: Nothing significant. Wish we had started this project sooner!

customer-feedback.Comments: Pilot property results are promising. 15% housekeeping efficiency gain is impressive. Staff adoption going well.
customer-feedback.Improvements: Would like more customization options for the guest-facing features. Training could be more hands-on.

quality-finding.Title: Dependencies not documented at intake
quality-finding.Description: SAP API dependencies were not thoroughly documented during intake assessment, leading to underestimated complexity.
quality-finding.Resolution Notes: Implementing mandatory API assessment checklist for all integration projects.

quality-finding.Title: Scope estimation methodology gap
quality-finding.Description: SCADA modernization scope did not account for firmware version variations across plants.
quality-finding.Resolution Notes: Developing site assessment checklist that includes firmware version inventory.

quality-finding.Title: Escalation delay - 3 weeks before leadership notified
quality-finding.Description: Project issues were known for 3 weeks before being escalated to leadership, delaying intervention.
quality-finding.Resolution Notes: Implemented automatic escalation triggers based on health score thresholds.

quality-finding.Title: ML capability assessment insufficient
quality-finding.Description: ML model accuracy requirements were committed without adequate prototype validation.
quality-finding.Resolution Notes: Requiring POC validation for all ML-based deliverables before commitment.

quality-finding.Title: Budget estimate lacked contingency
quality-finding.Description: Integration project budget did not include contingency for discovery complexity. Industry standard is 15-20% for integration work.
quality-finding.Resolution Notes: Updating estimating templates to include mandatory contingency percentages by project type.

corrective-action.Title: Mandatory site assessment checklist
corrective-action.Root Cause: No standardized process for assessing infrastructure variations across deployment sites.
corrective-action.Action Description: Create and mandate a comprehensive site assessment checklist for all multi-site deployment projects.

corrective-action.Title: Automatic escalation triggers
corrective-action.Root Cause: Escalation relied on PM judgment without automated triggers.
corrective-action.Action Description: Implement system-level escalation triggers when health scores drop to Yellow for 2 consecutive weeks or Red for any period.
corrective-action.Resolution Evidence: Escalation workflow configured and tested. Triggers notifications to services leadership.

corrective-action.Title: API assessment gate for integration projects
corrective-action.Root Cause: No formal API assessment required during intake for integration projects.
corrective-action.Action Description: Add mandatory API compatibility assessment checkpoint to intake quality gate for all integration-type projects.

corrective-action.Title: Contingency budget standards
corrective-action.Root Cause: Estimating templates did not enforce contingency allocation.
corrective-action.Action Description: Update all estimating templates to include mandatory contingency: 10% for implementation, 15% for integration, 20% for custom development.

corrective-action.Title: ML POC validation requirement
corrective-action.Root Cause: ML capability commitments made without proof-of-concept validation.
corrective-action.Action Description: Require POC/prototype validation with customer data sample for all projects involving ML models before finalizing scope and budget.

recovery-plan.Trigger Reason: Overall health Red for 4 consecutive weeks. Budget overrun at 20%. Multiple milestone misses. Customer satisfaction score 2/5.
recovery-plan.Root Problem: Underestimated SCADA firmware variation across 12 plants. Protocol compatibility issues at 4 plants required custom solutions. Original timeline did not account for site-by-site assessment.
recovery-plan.Key Risk Areas: Team burnout from extended timeline. Customer relationship damage. Additional budget overrun if remaining plants have similar issues.
recovery-plan.Immediate Actions:
1. Dedicated SCADA specialist contractor engaged.
2. Site assessment for all remaining plants completed.
3. Weekly executive briefing with customer established.
4. Team rotation plan to prevent burnout.
recovery-plan.Leadership Support: VP of Services assigned as executive sponsor. Weekly steering committee reviews. Additional budget approved.
recovery-plan.Customer Comm Plan: Weekly executive briefings with Karen Phillips. Bi-weekly progress reports to board. Monthly on-site reviews.
recovery-plan.New Milestone Targets:
Plants 5-8: May 15
Plants 9-12: June 30
Full cutover: July 15
recovery-plan.Outcome Notes: Week 3 of recovery. Plant 7 issue resolved. Plants 5-6 on track. Progress improving.

delivery-audit.Findings: Exemplary project management. Status reports consistently on time and detailed. Strong risk management. Minor gap in documentation versioning.
delivery-audit.Recommendation: Model project. Use as template for PM training.

delivery-audit.Findings: Risk management gaps led to late detection of critical issues. Governance processes not followed for scope changes. Documentation incomplete for first 3 months. Recovery plan now providing structure.
delivery-audit.Required Actions: Complete all documentation backlog. Establish formal change control board. Implement automated risk review reminders.
delivery-audit.Recommendation: Close monitoring required. Weekly PMO reviews until health improves to Yellow.

delivery-audit.Findings: Good overall management. ML deliverable quality below expectations. Appropriate risk logging for technical challenges. Could improve customer expectation management around ML capabilities.
delivery-audit.Required Actions: Establish ML accuracy milestone gates. Improve customer communication on ML model limitations.

delivery-audit.Findings: Outstanding across all dimensions. DO-178C compliance documentation exemplary. Strong customer relationship. Perfect time discipline.
delivery-audit.Recommendation: Best-in-class delivery. Nominate for internal excellence award.

closeout-record.Follow Up Opportunities: Parent portal enhancements. Mobile app for students. Integration with LMS platforms.
closeout-record.Notes: Clean closeout. All checklist items completed within 10 days.

closeout-record.Follow Up Opportunities: Patient Portal 2.0 project already initiated based on telehealth success.
closeout-record.Notes: Exceptionally clean closeout. Under budget, ahead of schedule.

closeout-record.Follow Up Opportunities: Self-service analytics training. Dashboard development services.
closeout-record.Notes: Awaiting customer sign-off on final data validation report. Documentation 80% complete.

post-project-review.What Went Well: Strong requirements gathering. Good stakeholder engagement. Training was well-received. Phased rollout approach worked well.
post-project-review.What Went Poorly: Training materials took longer than expected. Some edge cases in grade calculation not caught in testing.
post-project-review.Delivery Blockers: Academic calendar constraints limited testing windows.
post-project-review.Process Breakdowns: UAT feedback loop was too slow - needed more structured process.
post-project-review.Quality Issues: Grade calculation edge cases. Fixed in production within 24 hours.
post-project-review.Customer Sentiment: Very positive. Customer satisfied with outcome. Rated 4/5 overall.
post-project-review.Team Recommendations: Allocate more time for training material development. Build UAT feedback portal. Start UAT earlier.
post-project-review.Best Practices: Phased rollout approach. Dedicated training team. Weekly demo sessions with end users.
post-project-review.Expansion Ideas: Parent portal enhancements. Mobile app. LMS integration. Analytics dashboard.

post-project-review.What Went Well: Clear requirements from clinical team. Strong HIPAA compliance from day one. Excellent vendor collaboration on API integration. Under budget.
post-project-review.What Went Poorly: Nothing significant. Minor video quality issues at launch resolved within 48 hours.
post-project-review.Quality Issues: Video quality at launch - vendor-side configuration issue.
post-project-review.Customer Sentiment: Exceptional. 5/5 rating. Patient adoption exceeded expectations by 30%.
post-project-review.Team Recommendations: Use this project as template for future healthcare integrations. Same team requested for Phase 2.
post-project-review.Best Practices: Early HIPAA compliance planning. Vendor API certification parallel path. Patient focus groups during design.
post-project-review.Expansion Ideas: Patient Portal 2.0 with expanded functionality. Remote patient monitoring integration.

lessons-learned.Title: Phased rollout reduces deployment risk
lessons-learned.Description: Rolling out to one department first, then expanding, caught issues early and built confidence.
lessons-learned.Recommendation: Mandate phased rollout for all multi-stakeholder implementations.

lessons-learned.Title: Training material development needs dedicated time
lessons-learned.Description: Training materials were started too late and rushed. End user onboarding suffered.
lessons-learned.Recommendation: Start training material development in parallel with development, not after.

lessons-learned.Title: Early HIPAA compliance planning prevents rework
lessons-learned.Description: Building HIPAA compliance into design from sprint 1 eliminated late-stage compliance rework.
lessons-learned.Recommendation: For all healthcare projects, embed compliance review in sprint definition of done.

lessons-learned.Title: Patient focus groups improve adoption
lessons-learned.Description: Conducting patient focus groups during design phase led to 30% higher adoption than projected.
lessons-learned.Recommendation: Include end-user focus groups in all patient-facing application designs.

lessons-learned.Title: Multi-site projects need individual site assessments
lessons-learned.Description: Assuming all 12 plants had identical SCADA configurations was a costly mistake. Firmware versions varied widely.
lessons-learned.Recommendation: Mandatory per-site technical assessment for all multi-location deployments.

lessons-learned.Title: Early escalation saves money and relationships
lessons-learned.Description: Waiting 3 weeks to escalate cost us customer trust and additional budget. Earlier intervention would have been cheaper.
lessons-learned.Recommendation: Implement automated escalation triggers. No PM should wait more than 1 week to escalate Red status.

lessons-learned.Title: Integration projects need higher contingency budgets
lessons-learned.Description: Standard 10% contingency is insufficient for complex integration work. Discovery always reveals surprises.
lessons-learned.Recommendation: Minimum 15% contingency for integration projects, 20% for multi-vendor integrations.

integration-link.Notes: Schedule sync every 4 hours. Milestone dates bidirectional.
Material master and BOM data inbound sync.
Milestone updates and status reports pushed to Basecamp.
Recovery plan timeline not yet synced. Manual update needed.
Project kickoff tasks and deliverables synced.
Test results and defect tracking from Jira.
